---
title: "shiny_shell"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#install.packages('shinydashboard')
library(shiny)
library(shinydashboard)
library(tidyverse)
#install.packages("janitor")
library(janitor)
library(xgboost)
library(plotly)
library(DT)

nfl_data <- read.csv("master_data.csv") %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    temperature       = if ("temp_f" %in% names(.)) as.numeric(temp_f) else NA_real_,
    injured_next_week = as.numeric(as.logical(injured_next_week)),
    surface_type      = as.character(surface_type),
    game_id           = paste(season, week, game_type, sep = "_")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(surface_type),
    !is.na(team)
  )

team_full_name <- c(
  ARI = "Arizona Cardinals",
  ATL = "Atlanta Falcons",
  BAL = "Baltimore Ravens",
  BUF = "Buffalo Bills",
  CAR = "Carolina Panthers",
  CHI = "Chicago Bears",
  CIN = "Cincinnati Bengals",
  CLE = "Cleveland Browns",
  DAL = "Dallas Cowboys",
  DEN = "Denver Broncos",
  DET = "Detroit Lions",
  GB  = "Green Bay Packers",
  HOU = "Houston Texans",
  IND = "Indianapolis Colts",
  JAC = "Jacksonville Jaguars",
  JAX = "Jacksonville Jaguars",
  KC  = "Kansas City Chiefs",
  LA  = "Los Angeles Rams",
  LAR = "Los Angeles Rams",
  LAC = "Los Angeles Chargers",
  LV  = "Las Vegas Raiders",
  MIA = "Miami Dolphins",
  MIN = "Minnesota Vikings",
  NE  = "New England Patriots",
  NO  = "New Orleans Saints",
  NYG = "New York Giants",
  NYJ = "New York Jets",
  OAK = "Oakland Raiders",
  PHI = "Philadelphia Eagles",
  PIT = "Pittsburgh Steelers",
  SD  = "San Diego Chargers",
  SEA = "Seattle Seahawks",
  SF  = "San Francisco 49ers",
  STL = "St. Louis Rams",
  TB  = "Tampa Bay Buccaneers",
  TEN = "Tennessee Titans",
  WAS = "Washington Commanders"
)

to_full_team <- function(abbr) {
  out <- team_full_name[as.character(abbr)]
  out[is.na(out)] <- as.character(abbr)[is.na(out)]
  unname(out)
}

team_abbrevs_in_data <- sort(unique(nfl_data$team))
team_labels <- to_full_team(team_abbrevs_in_data)
team_choice_order <- order(team_labels)
team_select_choices <- setNames(
  team_abbrevs_in_data[team_choice_order],
  team_labels[team_choice_order]
)
```

```{r}
# ─── UI ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ui <- dashboardPage(
  skin = "black",
  dashboardHeader(
    title = span(
      img(src = "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/a/a2/National_Football_League_logo.svg",
          height = "30px", style = "margin-right: 8px;"),
      "NFL Injury Risk Dashboard"
    ),
    titleWidth = 300
  ),

  dashboardSidebar(
    width = 300,
    sidebarMenu(
      id = "tabs",
      menuItem("Overview",                  tabName = "overview",    icon = icon("chart-line")),
      menuItem("Injury Risk Predictor",     tabName = "predictor",   icon = icon("user-injured")),
      menuItem("Position Analysis",         tabName = "position",    icon = icon("running")),
      menuItem("Game & Environment",        tabName = "environment", icon = icon("cloud-sun")),
      menuItem("Workload & Snap Count",     tabName = "workload",    icon = icon("stopwatch")),
      menuItem("Individual Team Dashboard", tabName = "team",        icon = icon("shield-alt")),
      menuItem("Rule Changes Impact",       tabName = "rules",       icon = icon("gavel")),
      menuItem("Injury Field Map",          tabName = "fieldmap",    icon = icon("football-ball")),
      menuItem("Concussion Analysis", tabName = "concussion", icon = icon("brain"))
    ),
    hr(),
    tags$div(
      style = "padding: 0 15px;",
      tags$h4("Global Filters", style = "color: #b8c7ce; font-size: 13px;"),
      sliderInput("season_range", "Seasons:", min = 2010, max = 2024, value = c(2010, 2024), sep = ""),
      selectInput("game_type", "Game Type:", choices = c("All", "REG", "POST"), selected = "All")
    )
  ),

  dashboardBody(
    tags$head(tags$style(HTML("
      .content-wrapper, .right-side { background-color: #1a1a2e; }
      .box { border-top: 3px solid #c9243f; background-color: #16213e; color: #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px; }
      .info-box { background-color: #16213e !important; color: #ffffff !important; border-radius: 8px; }
      h3.page-title { color: #ffffff; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 25px; }
      .table { color: #e0e0e0; }
      .week-display {
        font-size: 28px; font-weight: bold; color: #c9243f;
        text-align: center; padding: 10px; background-color: #0d0d1a;
        border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 10px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      }
      .injury-counter { font-size: 16px; color: #b8c7ce; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 15px; }
      .play-btn  { background-color: #c9243f !important; color: white !important; border: none !important; border-radius: 6px !important; font-size: 16px !important; width: 100% !important; margin-bottom: 8px !important; }
      .reset-btn { background-color: #2a3a5a !important; color: white !important; border: none !important; border-radius: 6px !important; width: 100% !important; margin-bottom: 8px !important; }
    "))),

    tabItems(

      # --- Tab: Overview ---
      tabItem(tabName = "overview",
  h3("League-Wide Injury Trends", class = "page-title"),
  fluidRow(
    infoBoxOutput("total_injuries_box",  width = 3),
    infoBoxOutput("avg_per_season_box",  width = 3),
    infoBoxOutput("injury_rate_box",     width = 3),
    infoBoxOutput("injury_cost_box",     width = 3)
  ),
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Weekly Injury Trend", width = 12, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        plotOutput("injury_season_trend"))
  ),
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Injury Rate by Position", width = 6, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        plotOutput("overview_position_plot")),
    box(title = "Workload vs Injury Risk", width = 6, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        plotOutput("overview_workload_plot"))
  ),
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "About this Dashboard", width = 12, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        p("This dashboard analyzes injury across the NFL using player workload, environment, and positional data."),
        tags$ul(
          tags$li("Use filters to explore trends"),
          tags$li("Compare injury rates across positions and conditions"),
          tags$li("Use the predictor tab to estimate injury risk")
        ))
  )
),

      # --- Tab: Predictor ---
      tabItem(tabName = "predictor",
  h3("Injury Risk Predictor", class = "page-title"),
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Player Inputs", width = 4, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        selectInput("pred_model", "Select Model:", choices = c("XGBoost", "Random Forest", "Lasso")),
        sliderInput("pred_age", "Age:", min = 21, max = 40, value = 26),
        sliderInput("pred_bmi", "BMI:", min = 20, max = 40, value = 27),
        sliderInput("pred_exp", "Years Experience:", min = 0, max = 20, value = 3),
        sliderInput("pred_plays", "Total Plays:", min = 0, max = 80, value = 20),
        selectInput("pred_position", "Position Group:",
                    choices = c("QB", "RB", "Receiver", "O-Line", "D-Line", "LB", "Secondary", "Special Teams")),
        selectInput("pred_surface", "Surface Type:",
                    choices = c("Natural Grass", "Artificial Turf", "Unknown")),
        actionButton("predict_btn", "Predict Injury Risk",
                     style = "background-color:#c9243f; color:white; width:100%;")),
    box(title = "Predicted Injury Risk", width = 8, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        h3(textOutput("pred_probability"),
           style = "text-align:center; font-size:64px; color:#c9243f; margin-top:40px;"),
        h4(textOutput("pred_label"),
           style = "text-align:center; color:#e0e0e0; font-size:20px;"),
        hr(),
        p("Prediction based on XGBoost, Random Forest, or Lasso models trained on 2024 NFL data.",
          style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:12px;"))
  ),
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Body Part Injury Distribution", width = 6, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        plotOutput("body_part_pie", height = "380px"),
        p("Estimated injury likelihood by body region based on position group.",
          style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:11px; text-align:center;")),
    box(title = "Highest Risk Play Types", width = 6, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        plotOutput("risk_plays_plot", height = "380px"),
        p("Play types historically associated with injuries for this position.",
          style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:11px; text-align:center;"))
  ),
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Risk Factor Breakdown", width = 6, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        plotOutput("risk_factor_plot", height = "320px"),
        p("How each input contributes to the predicted injury probability.",
          style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:11px; text-align:center;")),
    box(title = "Player Risk Profile", width = 6, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        uiOutput("risk_profile_text"))
  )
),

      # --- Tab: Position Analysis ---
      tabItem(tabName = "position",
  h3("Position Analysis", class = "page-title"),
  fluidRow(
    box(width = 4, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        checkboxGroupInput("position_choice", "Select Positions:",
                           choices = sort(unique(nfl_data$position_group)),
                           selected = sort(unique(nfl_data$position_group)))),
    box(title = "Injury Rate by Position", width = 8, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        plotOutput("position_rate_plot"))
  )
),

      # --- Tab: Environment ---
      tabItem(tabName = "environment",
  h3("Game & Environmental Factors", class = "page-title"),
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Surface Filter", width = 4, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        checkboxGroupInput("surface_choice", "Select Surface:",
                           choices = unique(nfl_data$surface_type),
                           selected = unique(nfl_data$surface_type))),
    box(title = "Temp Filter", width = 8, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        sliderInput("temp_slider", "Temperature Range (F):",
                    min = min(nfl_data$temperature, na.rm = TRUE),
                    max = max(nfl_data$temperature, na.rm = TRUE),
                    value = c(20, 90)))
  ),
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Injury Rate by Surface", width = 6, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        plotOutput("surface_comparison")),
    box(title = "Injury Trend by Temperature", width = 6, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        plotOutput("temp_plot"))
  )
),

      # --- Tab: Workload ---
      tabItem(tabName = "workload",
  h3("Workload & Snap Count", class = "page-title"),
  fluidRow(
    box(width = 4, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE, title = "Controls",
        sliderInput("play_limit", "Focus Play Count Range:", min = 0, max = 100, value = c(0, 80)),
        p("Analysis shows risk increases significantly after 60+ snaps.",
          style = "font-size: 12px; color: #b8c7ce;")),
    box(width = 8, title = "Probability Curve", status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
        plotOutput("workload_plot"))
  )
),

      # --- Tab: Team Dashboard ---
tabItem(tabName = "team",
  h3("Individual Team Dashboard", class = "page-title"),
  fluidRow(
    box(width = 4, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE, title = "Team Selector",
        selectInput("team_select", "Select Team:",
                    choices = team_select_choices),
        selectInput("position_filter", "Filter by Position:",
                    choices  = c("All", sort(unique(nfl_data$position_group))),
                    selected = "All")),
    infoBoxOutput("team_injuries_box", width = 8)
  ),
  fluidRow(box(title = textOutput("team_roster_title", inline = TRUE),
               width = 12, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
               tableOutput("team_table")))
),

      # --- Tab: Rules ---
tabItem(tabName = "rules",
  h3("Rule Changes & Injury Risk Factors", class = "page-title"),

  fluidRow(
    box(
      title = "NFL Safety Rule Timeline",
      width = 12, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
      plotOutput("rules_timeline_plot", height = "420px"),
      p("Dashed vertical lines mark major NFL rule changes that affected contact intensity, player safety, and play structure.",
        style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:11px; text-align:center; margin-top:8px;")
    )
  ),

  fluidRow(
    box(
      title = "Hits per Game vs Injury Risk",
      width = 6, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
      plotOutput("rules_hits_plot", height = "330px"),
      p("Players who absorb more hits tend to show higher injury risk over time.",
        style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:11px; text-align:center;")
    ),
    box(
      title = "Total Plays vs Injury Risk",
      width = 6, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
      plotOutput("rules_workload_plot", height = "330px"),
      p("Higher snap counts are associated with a gradual rise in injury probability.",
        style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:11px; text-align:center;")
    )
  ),

  fluidRow(
    box(
      title = "Major Player Safety Changes, 2010–2024",
      width = 12, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
      uiOutput("rules_cards"),
      p(
        "Source: Sports King, \"The Complete Visual History of NFL Rule Changes\".",
        style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:10.5px; margin-top:10px; text-align:right;"
      )
    )
  )
),

      # --- Tab: Injury Field Map ---
      tabItem(tabName = "fieldmap",
        h3("Injury Field Map", class = "page-title"),
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 3, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE, title = "Controls",
              fluidRow(
                column(6, actionButton("play_btn",  label = tagList(icon("play"), " Play"),  class = "play-btn")),
                column(6, actionButton("reset_btn", label = tagList(icon("undo"), " Reset"), class = "reset-btn"))
              ),
              br(),
              uiOutput("week_slider_ui"),
              selectInput("anim_speed", "Playback Speed:",
                          choices  = c("Slow (2s)" = 2000, "Normal (1s)" = 1000, "Fast (0.5s)" = 500),
                          selected = 1000),
              hr(),
              selectInput("field_position", "Position Group:",
                          choices  = c("All", sort(unique(nfl_data$position_group))),
                          selected = "All"),
              selectInput("field_surface", "Surface Type:",
                          choices  = c("All", sort(unique(nfl_data$surface_type))),
                          selected = "All"),
              checkboxInput("field_cumulative", "Cumulative (all weeks up to current)", value = FALSE),
              checkboxInput("field_density",    "Show Density Overlay",                value = TRUE),
              p("Each dot = one injury. Press Play to animate week by week, or drag the slider manually.",
                style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:11px; margin-top:10px;")
          ),
          box(width = 9, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE, title = "Injury Locations on Field",
              uiOutput("week_badge"),
              plotOutput("field_map", height = "460px"))
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 12, title = "Injury Log - Current Week", status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
              DT::dataTableOutput("injury_log"))
        )
      ),

# --- Tab: Concussion ---
tabItem(tabName = "concussion",
  h3("Concussion Analysis", class = "page-title"),

  fluidRow(
    infoBoxOutput("conc_total_box",   width = 3),
    infoBoxOutput("conc_drop_box",    width = 3),
    infoBoxOutput("conc_rtp_box",     width = 3),
    infoBoxOutput("conc_focus_box",   width = 3)
  ),

  fluidRow(
    box(
      title = "Why Concussions Matter",
      width = 6, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
      p("Concussions remain one of the most important player-safety issues in football because they can affect both short-term availability and long-term health."),
      p("The public-health literature emphasizes that equipment alone cannot eliminate risk, and that prevention also depends on tackling technique, rule changes, and supervised recovery."),
      p("This dashboard section is meant to make those safety concerns easy to see at a glance."),
    ),
    box(
      title = "Headline Safety Takeaways",
      width = 6, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
      uiOutput("conc_takeaways"),
    )
  ),

  fluidRow(
    box(
      title = "NFL Concussion Trend Summary (2015–2024)",
      width = 12, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
      plotOutput("conc_trend_plot", height = "380px"),
      p("The 2024 concussion total is taken from the public NFL season report shown in the source image.",
        style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:11px; text-align:center; margin-top:8px;")
    )
  ),

  fluidRow(
    box(
      title = "What Prevention Needs to Address",
      width = 12, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
      uiOutput("conc_recovery_info")
    )
  )
)

    ) # end tabItems
  ) # end dashboardBody
) # end dashboardPage


# ─── SERVER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # ── THEME ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  theme_nfl_custom <- function() {
    theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        text             = element_text(color = "white"),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#2a3a5a"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        axis.text        = element_text(color = "#b8c7ce"),
        plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
      )
  }

  # ── BASE DATA ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  base_data <- reactive({
    nfl_data %>%
      filter(season >= input$season_range[1], season <= input$season_range[2]) %>%
      { if (input$game_type != "All") filter(., game_type == input$game_type) else . }
  })

  # ── DYNAMIC WEEK SLIDER ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  max_reg_week <- reactive({
    if (input$season_range[2] >= 2021) 18L else 17L
  })

  output$week_slider_ui <- renderUI({
    sliderInput("week_slider", "Week:",
                min = 1, max = max_reg_week(), value = 1, step = 1)
  })

  observeEvent(max_reg_week(), {
    cur <- anim_week()
    if (cur > max_reg_week()) anim_week(max_reg_week())
  })

  # ── ANIMATION STATE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  playing   <- reactiveVal(FALSE)
  anim_week <- reactiveVal(1)

  observeEvent(input$week_slider, {
    anim_week(input$week_slider)
  }, ignoreInit = TRUE)

  observeEvent(input$play_btn, {
    if (playing()) {
      playing(FALSE)
      updateActionButton(session, "play_btn", label = tagList(icon("play"), " Play"))
    } else {
      if (anim_week() >= max_reg_week()) anim_week(1)
      playing(TRUE)
      updateActionButton(session, "play_btn", label = tagList(icon("pause"), " Pause"))
    }
  })

  observeEvent(input$reset_btn, {
    playing(FALSE)
    updateActionButton(session, "play_btn", label = tagList(icon("play"), " Play"))
    anim_week(1)
    updateSliderInput(session, "week_slider", value = 1)
  })

  observe({
    req(playing())
    invalidateLater(as.numeric(input$anim_speed), session)
    isolate({
      nxt <- anim_week() + 1
      if (nxt > max_reg_week()) {
        playing(FALSE)
        updateActionButton(session, "play_btn", label = tagList(icon("play"), " Play"))
      } else {
        anim_week(nxt)
        updateSliderInput(session, "week_slider", value = nxt)
      }
    })
  })

  # ── FIELD MAP DATA ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  field_data <- reactive({
    df <- base_data() %>% filter(!is.na(avg_ydline_100), injured_next_week == 1)
    if (input$field_position != "All") df <- df %>% filter(position_group == input$field_position)
    if (input$field_surface  != "All") df <- df %>% filter(surface_type   == input$field_surface)
    df
  })

  current_week_data <- reactive({
    df <- field_data()
    if (isTRUE(input$field_cumulative)) df %>% filter(week <= anim_week())
    else df %>% filter(week == anim_week())
  })

  # ── WEEK BADGE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$week_badge <- renderUI({
    wk    <- anim_week()
    cnt   <- nrow(current_week_data())
    label <- paste0("Regular Season - Week ", wk)
    tagList(
      tags$div(class = "week-display", label),
      tags$div(class = "injury-counter",
               paste0(cnt, " injur", ifelse(cnt == 1, "y", "ies"),
                      if (isTRUE(input$field_cumulative)) " (cumulative)" else " this week"))
    )
  })

  # ── FIELD MAP PLOT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$field_map <- renderPlot({
    df  <- current_week_data()
    all <- field_data()
    set.seed(123)

    place <- function(d) d %>% mutate(field_x = avg_ydline_100, field_y = runif(n(), 8, 52))
    df  <- place(df)
    all <- place(all)

    p <- ggplot() +
      annotate("rect", xmin = 0,  xmax = 100, ymin = 0, ymax = 60, fill = "#2d5a1b") +
      annotate("rect", xmin = 0,  xmax = 10,  ymin = 0, ymax = 60, fill = "#1a3d0f") +
      annotate("rect", xmin = 90, xmax = 100, ymin = 0, ymax = 60, fill = "#1a3d0f") +
      annotate("rect", xmin = c(10, 30, 50, 70, 90), xmax = c(20, 40, 60, 80, 100),
               ymin = 0, ymax = 60, fill = "#336b22", alpha = 0.45) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = seq(10, 90, 10), color = "white", linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.8) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = seq(15, 85, 10), color = "white", linewidth = 0.2, alpha = 0.35) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 50,              color = "white", linewidth = 1.2) +
      annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 100, ymin = 0, ymax = 60,
               fill = NA, color = "white", linewidth = 1) +
      annotate("text", x = seq(20, 80, 10), y = 4,
               label = c("20", "30", "40", "50", "40", "30", "20"),
               color = "white", size = 3.8, fontface = "bold") +
      annotate("text", x = seq(20, 80, 10), y = 56,
               label = c("20", "30", "40", "50", "40", "30", "20"),
               color = "white", size = 3.8, fontface = "bold") +
      annotate("text", x = 5,  y = 30, label = "END\nZONE",
               color = "white", size = 3.2, fontface = "bold", angle = 90) +
      annotate("text", x = 95, y = 30, label = "END\nZONE",
               color = "white", size = 3.2, fontface = "bold", angle = 90)

    if (!isTRUE(input$field_cumulative)) {
      past <- all %>% filter(week < anim_week())
      if (nrow(past) > 0) {
        past <- place(past)
        p <- p + geom_point(data = past, aes(x = field_x, y = field_y),
                            color = "white", size = 1.5, alpha = 0.1)
      }
    }

    if (nrow(df) > 0) {
      p <- p +
        geom_point(data = df, aes(x = field_x, y = field_y, color = position_group),
                   size = 3.5, alpha = 0.85) +
        geom_point(data = df, aes(x = field_x, y = field_y),
                   shape = 21, size = 3.5, color = "white", fill = NA, stroke = 0.6, alpha = 0.6)
      if (isTRUE(input$field_density) && nrow(df) >= 10)
        p <- p + geom_density_2d(data = df, aes(x = field_x, y = field_y),
                                 color = "#ff4444", linewidth = 0.9, alpha = 0.75)
    } else {
      p <- p + annotate("text", x = 50, y = 30,
                        label = "No injuries recorded this week",
                        color = "#b8c7ce", size = 6, fontface = "italic")
    }

    p +
      scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
      coord_fixed(ratio = 0.6, xlim = c(0, 100), ylim = c(0, 60)) +
      labs(color = "Position Group", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
      theme_void() +
      theme(
        plot.background   = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        panel.background  = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        legend.text       = element_text(color = "white", size = 11),
        legend.title      = element_text(color = "white", face = "bold", size = 12),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        legend.position   = "right"
      )
  })

  # ── INJURY LOG TABLE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$injury_log <- DT::renderDataTable({
    df <- current_week_data()
    if (nrow(df) == 0) return(data.frame(Message = "No injuries this week"))
    df %>%
      select(season, week, full_name, team, position_group,
             surface_type, avg_ydline_100, total_plays) %>%
      arrange(desc(season), week)
  },
  options = list(
    pageLength   = 10,
    scrollX      = TRUE,
    dom          = "frtip",
    initComplete = JS("function(settings, json) {
      $(this.api().table().header()).css({
        'background-color': '#16213e',
        'color': 'white'
      });
    }")
  ),
  style = "bootstrap", class = "table-dark")

  # ── ENVIRONMENT TAB ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$surface_comparison <- renderPlot({
    req(input$surface_choice)
    base_data() %>%
      filter(surface_type %in% input$surface_choice) %>%
      group_by(surface_type) %>%
      summarise(rate = mean(injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = surface_type, y = rate, fill = surface_type)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.6) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("#c9243f", "#1e5128", "#3db2ff")) +
      theme_nfl_custom() +
      labs(x = NULL, y = "Injury Rate")
  })

  output$temp_plot <- renderPlot({
    req(input$temp_slider)
    base_data() %>%
      filter(temperature >= input$temp_slider[1], temperature <= input$temp_slider[2]) %>%
      group_by(temp_bucket) %>%
      summarise(rate = mean(injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temp_bucket, y = rate, group = 1)) +
      geom_area(fill = "#c9243f", alpha = 0.3) +
      geom_line(color = "#c9243f", size = 1.5) +
      geom_point(color = "white", size = 3, stroke = 1) +
      theme_nfl_custom() +
      labs(x = "Climate Group", y = "Injury Risk")
  })

  # ── WORKLOAD TAB ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$workload_plot <- renderPlot({
    base_data() %>%
      filter(total_plays >= input$play_limit[1], total_plays <= input$play_limit[2]) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = total_plays, y = injured_next_week)) +
      geom_smooth(method = "glm", method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
                  color = "#4ecca3", fill = "#4ecca3", alpha = 0.2) +
      theme_nfl_custom() +
      labs(y = "Probability of Injury", x = "Total Snaps in Game")
  })

  # ── TEAM TAB ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$team_roster_title <- renderText({
  req(input$team_select)
  paste0("High Risk Exposure Roster - ", to_full_team(input$team_select))
})

output$team_injuries_box <- renderInfoBox({
  req(input$team_select)
  df <- base_data() %>% filter(team == input$team_select)
  if (!is.null(input$position_filter) && input$position_filter != "All") {
    df <- df %>% filter(position_group == input$position_filter)
  }

  total <- sum(df$injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)
  rate  <- mean(df$injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)
  rate_lbl <- if (is.nan(rate)) "n/a" else paste0(round(rate * 100, 1), "%")

  infoBox(
    title    = paste0(to_full_team(input$team_select), " - Total Injuries"),
    value    = total,
    subtitle = paste0("Injury rate: ", rate_lbl),
    icon     = icon("user-injured"),
    color    = "red",
    fill     = TRUE
  )
})

output$team_table <- renderTable({
  req(input$team_select)
  df <- base_data() %>% filter(team == input$team_select)
  if (input$position_filter != "All") df <- df %>% filter(position_group == input$position_filter)

  df %>%
    mutate(team_full = to_full_team(team)) %>%
    group_by(team_full, full_name, position) %>%
    summarise(
      weeks_played  = n(),
      times_injured = sum(injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE),
      injury_rate   = paste0(round(mean(injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1), "%"),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(weeks_played >= 5) %>%
    arrange(desc(times_injured)) %>%
    head(15) %>%
    rename(
      Team = team_full,
      Player = full_name,
      Position = position,
      `Weeks Played` = weeks_played,
      `Times Injured` = times_injured,
      `Injury Rate` = injury_rate
    )
})

  # ── MODEL LOADING ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
xgb_model <- tryCatch({
  mdl <- readRDS("xgb_model.rds")
  if (is.null(mdl) || length(mdl) == 0) { message("XGBoost empty."); NULL } else mdl
}, warning = function(w) { message("XGB warning: ", w$message); NULL },
   error   = function(e) { message("XGB fail: ",    e$message); NULL })

rf_model <- tryCatch(
  readRDS("rf_model.rds"),
  error = function(e) { message("RF fail: ", e$message); NULL }
)

final_lasso <- tryCatch(
  readRDS("lasso_model.rds"),
  error = function(e) { message("Lasso fail: ", e$message); NULL }
)

cv_lasso <- tryCatch(
  readRDS("cv_lasso.rds"),
  error = function(e) { message("CV Lasso fail: ", e$message); NULL }
)

  # ── PREDICTOR SETUP ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  position_levels <- c("D-Line", "LB", "O-Line", "Other", "QB", "RB",
                        "Receiver", "Secondary", "Special Teams")
  surface_levels  <- c("Artificial Turf", "Natural Grass", "Unknown")
  temp_levels     <- c("Cold", "Cool", "Dome/Unknown", "Freezing", "Hot", "Moderate")

  body_part_profiles <- list(
    "QB"            = c(Shoulder = 20, Knee = 18, Ankle = 12, Head = 15, Hand = 15, Back = 10, Hamstring = 5,  Foot = 5),
    "RB"            = c(Shoulder = 8,  Knee = 25, Ankle = 15, Head = 10, Hand = 3,  Back = 5,  Hamstring = 20, Foot = 14),
    "Receiver"      = c(Shoulder = 10, Knee = 20, Ankle = 15, Head = 12, Hand = 10, Back = 5,  Hamstring = 20, Foot = 8),
    "O-Line"        = c(Shoulder = 12, Knee = 28, Ankle = 15, Head = 10, Hand = 8,  Back = 12, Hamstring = 8,  Foot = 7),
    "D-Line"        = c(Shoulder = 14, Knee = 25, Ankle = 14, Head = 12, Hand = 6,  Back = 10, Hamstring = 10, Foot = 9),
    "LB"            = c(Shoulder = 15, Knee = 22, Ankle = 12, Head = 14, Hand = 5,  Back = 8,  Hamstring = 15, Foot = 9),
    "Secondary"     = c(Shoulder = 12, Knee = 20, Ankle = 13, Head = 15, Hand = 5,  Back = 5,  Hamstring = 22, Foot = 8),
    "Special Teams" = c(Shoulder = 10, Knee = 22, Ankle = 15, Head = 12, Hand = 5,  Back = 8,  Hamstring = 18, Foot = 10)
  )

  play_risk_profiles <- list(
    "QB"            = c("Sack / Pressure" = 30, "Scramble / Run" = 20, "Dropback Pass" = 18, "Play Action" = 12, "QB Sneak" = 10, "Screen Pass" = 5, "Other" = 5),
    "RB"            = c("Inside Run" = 28, "Outside Run" = 22, "Pass Blocking" = 15, "Receiving Route" = 12, "Kick Return" = 10, "Goal Line Carry" = 8, "Other" = 5),
    "Receiver"      = c("Route Running" = 25, "Contested Catch" = 20, "After Catch (YAC)" = 18, "Blocking Downfield" = 12, "Deep Route" = 10, "Screen / Bubble" = 8, "Other" = 7),
    "O-Line"        = c("Pass Blocking" = 35, "Run Blocking" = 28, "Pulling / Trap" = 15, "Double Team" = 10, "Screen Block" = 7, "Other" = 5),
    "D-Line"        = c("Pass Rush" = 32, "Run Stuff" = 25, "Tackle Attempt" = 18, "Stunts / Twists" = 12, "Pile Play" = 8, "Other" = 5),
    "LB"            = c("Tackle Attempt" = 28, "Blitz / Rush" = 20, "Zone Coverage" = 15, "Pursuit / Chase" = 14, "Man Coverage" = 10, "Run Fill" = 8, "Other" = 5),
    "Secondary"     = c("Man Coverage" = 25, "Tackle Attempt" = 22, "Zone Coverage" = 15, "Ball Breakup" = 13, "Blitz" = 10, "Kick Coverage" = 8, "Other" = 7),
    "Special Teams" = c("Kick Coverage" = 28, "Kick Return" = 25, "Punt Block / Rush" = 15, "Gunner / Jammer" = 12, "Field Goal Block" = 10, "Other" = 10)
  )

  injury_mechanisms <- list(
    "QB"            = list(top_risk = "Shoulder & Knee",  mechanism = "Non-contact arm injuries during throws, lower body from sacks.",   surface_note = "Artificial turf increases ankle sprain risk by ~16% for QBs.", age_note = "Injury risk rises after age 30."),
    "RB"            = list(top_risk = "Knee & Hamstring", mechanism = "Repetitive high-impact contact leads to cumulative knee stress.",   surface_note = "Turf increases non-contact lower extremity injuries.",           age_note = "Spike after age 27."),
    "Receiver"      = list(top_risk = "Hamstring & Knee", mechanism = "Explosive cuts strain hamstrings and knees.",                       surface_note = "Turf is particularly dangerous for receivers.",                  age_note = "Soft tissue injuries increase after age 28."),
    "O-Line"        = list(top_risk = "Knee & Ankle",     mechanism = "Sustained blocking puts lateral stress on knees.",                  surface_note = "Surface has less impact on O-Line.",                            age_note = "Higher knee degeneration after 8+ years."),
    "D-Line"        = list(top_risk = "Knee & Shoulder",  mechanism = "Explosive pass rush puts high torque on knees.",                   surface_note = "Turf increases lower extremity risk.",                          age_note = "Increases after age 29."),
    "LB"            = list(top_risk = "Knee & Shoulder",  mechanism = "Tackling is the primary injury mechanism.",                        surface_note = "Elevated concussion risk on turf.",                             age_note = "Tackle volume more predictive than age."),
    "Secondary"     = list(top_risk = "Hamstring & Knee", mechanism = "Backpedaling and transitions strain hamstrings.",                   surface_note = "High turf-related injury differentials.",                       age_note = "Hamstring risk increases sharply after 28."),
    "Special Teams" = list(top_risk = "Knee & Hamstring", mechanism = "Full-speed collisions on kickoffs.",                                surface_note = "Similar rates on both surfaces.",                               age_note = "Tied more to snap count than age.")
  )

  lasso_intercept <- -1.86752973
  lasso_coefs <- c(
    years_exp      =  0.08449421,
    surface_type   =  0.01558592,
    temp_bucket    =  0.00927171,
    total_plays    = -0.00251280,
    avg_air_yards  =  0.00571426,
    bmi            =  0.00334269,
    rush_plays     =  0.01388763,
    age            = -0.07195676,
    position_group =  0.00383627,
    is_home        = -0.01446860,
    avg_ydline_100 =  0.00084164
  )

  # ── PREDICTOR EVENT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$predict_btn, {

    input_vals <- c(
      years_exp      = as.numeric(input$pred_exp),
      surface_type   = as.numeric(factor(input$pred_surface, levels = surface_levels)),
      temp_bucket    = as.numeric(factor("Dome/Unknown",      levels = temp_levels)),
      total_plays    = as.numeric(input$pred_plays),
      avg_air_yards  = 0,
      bmi            = as.numeric(input$pred_bmi),
      rush_plays     = 0,
      age            = as.numeric(input$pred_age),
      position_group = as.numeric(factor(input$pred_position, levels = position_levels)),
      is_home        = 1,
      avg_ydline_100 = 50
    )

    pred_input           <- matrix(input_vals, nrow = 1)
    colnames(pred_input) <- names(input_vals)
    prob                 <- NA

    if (input$pred_model == "XGBoost" && !is.null(xgb_model)) {
      prob <- tryCatch({
        dmat <- xgboost::xgb.DMatrix(data = pred_input)
        as.numeric(predict(xgb_model, dmat)[1])
      }, error = function(e) NA)

    } else if (input$pred_model == "Random Forest" && !is.null(rf_model)) {
      prob <- tryCatch({
        pred_df <- as.data.frame(pred_input)
        for (col in names(pred_df)) pred_df[[col]] <- as.numeric(pred_df[[col]])
        as.numeric(predict(rf_model, newdata = pred_df, type = "prob")[1, "1"])
      }, error = function(e) NA)

    } else if (input$pred_model == "Lasso" && !is.null(final_lasso)) {
      prob <- tryCatch({
        raw <- predict(final_lasso, newx = pred_input,
                       s = final_lasso$lambda[1], type = "response")
        as.numeric(raw[1])
      }, error = function(e) NA)
    }

    if (is.na(prob)) {
      linear_pred <- lasso_intercept + sum(lasso_coefs * input_vals)
      prob        <- 1 / (1 + exp(-linear_pred))
    }

    prob <- max(0, min(1, as.numeric(prob[1])))
    pct  <- round(prob * 100, 1)

    output$pred_probability <- renderText({
      if (is.na(pct)) "N/A" else paste0(pct, "%")
    })

    output$pred_label <- renderText({
      if (is.na(prob))        "Error"
      else if (prob >= 0.045) "High Injury Risk"
      else if (prob >= 0.03)  "Moderate Injury Risk"
      else                    "Low Injury Risk"
    })

    output$body_part_pie <- renderPlot({
      pos     <- input$pred_position
      profile <- body_part_profiles[[pos]]
      if (is.null(profile)) profile <- body_part_profiles[["QB"]]
      pie_data <- data.frame(body_part = names(profile), percentage = as.numeric(profile)) %>%
        arrange(desc(percentage)) %>%
        mutate(
          body_part = factor(body_part, levels = body_part),
          label     = paste0(body_part, "\n", percentage, "%")
        )
      pie_colors <- c("#c9243f", "#e8575a", "#f09090", "#3db2ff",
                      "#4ecca3", "#f0c040", "#b07cd8", "#6c8ebf")
      ggplot(pie_data, aes(x = "", y = percentage, fill = body_part)) +
        geom_col(width = 1, color = "#16213e", linewidth = 0.8) +
        coord_polar(theta = "y") +
        scale_fill_manual(values = pie_colors) +
        geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
                  color = "white", size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
        labs(title = paste0("Injury Distribution - ", pos), fill = "Body Region") +
        theme_void() +
        theme(
          plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
          plot.title       = element_text(color = "white", hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
          legend.text      = element_text(color = "#e0e0e0"),
          legend.title     = element_text(color = "white", face = "bold")
        )
    })

    output$risk_plays_plot <- renderPlot({
      pos   <- input$pred_position
      plays <- play_risk_profiles[[pos]]
      if (is.null(plays)) plays <- play_risk_profiles[["QB"]]
      play_data <- data.frame(play_type = names(plays), percentage = as.numeric(plays)) %>%
        mutate(play_type = factor(play_type, levels = rev(play_type)))
      ggplot(play_data, aes(x = play_type, y = percentage, fill = percentage)) +
        geom_col(width = 0.7, show.legend = FALSE) +
        geom_text(aes(label = paste0(percentage, "%")), hjust = -0.2,
                  color = "white", size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
        coord_flip() +
        scale_fill_gradient(low = "#3db2ff", high = "#c9243f") +
        scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
        labs(title = paste0("Injury Risk by Play Type - ", pos), x = NULL, y = "% of Injuries") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
          text               = element_text(color = "white"),
          plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
          panel.background   = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
          panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "#2a3a5a"),
          axis.text          = element_text(color = "#e0e0e0", size = 11),
          plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = "white")
        )
    })

    output$risk_factor_plot <- renderPlot({
      baseline <- c(years_exp = 4, surface_type = 2, temp_bucket = 3, total_plays = 30,
                    avg_air_yards = 0, bmi = 27, rush_plays = 0, age = 26,
                    position_group = 5, is_home = 1, avg_ydline_100 = 50)
      nice_names <- c(
        years_exp = "Experience", surface_type = "Surface", temp_bucket = "Temperature",
        total_plays = "Total Plays", avg_air_yards = "Air Yards", bmi = "BMI",
        rush_plays = "Rush Plays", age = "Age", position_group = "Position",
        is_home = "Home/Away", avg_ydline_100 = "Avg Yard Line"
      )
      contributions <- lasso_coefs * (input_vals - baseline)
      contrib_data  <- data.frame(
        factor_name  = nice_names[names(contributions)],
        contribution = as.numeric(contributions)
      ) %>%
        filter(abs(contribution) > 0.001) %>%
        arrange(contribution) %>%
        mutate(
          factor_name = factor(factor_name, levels = factor_name),
          direction   = ifelse(contribution > 0, "Increases Risk", "Decreases Risk")
        )
      ggplot(contrib_data, aes(x = factor_name, y = contribution, fill = direction)) +
        geom_col(width = 0.6, show.legend = TRUE) +
        coord_flip() +
        scale_fill_manual(values = c("Increases Risk" = "#c9243f", "Decreases Risk" = "#4ecca3")) +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "#b8c7ce", linetype = "dashed") +
        labs(title = "Risk Factor Contributions", x = NULL,
             y = "Effect on Injury Probability", fill = NULL) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
          text               = element_text(color = "white"),
          plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
          panel.background   = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
          panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "#2a3a5a"),
          axis.text          = element_text(color = "#e0e0e0", size = 10),
          plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, color = "white"),
          legend.position    = "bottom",
          legend.text        = element_text(color = "#e0e0e0")
        )
    })

    output$risk_profile_text <- renderUI({
      pos  <- input$pred_position
      info <- injury_mechanisms[[pos]]
      if (is.null(info)) info <- injury_mechanisms[["QB"]]

      workload_flag <- if (input$pred_plays >= 50)
        tags$p(icon("exclamation-triangle"), tags$b(" HIGH WORKLOAD WARNING: "),
               paste0(input$pred_plays, " plays significantly elevates injury risk."),
               style = "color:#f0c040; background-color:#2a2a1a; padding:10px; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:12px;")
      else NULL

      age_flag <- if (input$pred_age >= 30)
        tags$p(icon("clock"), tags$b(" AGE FACTOR: "), "Player is 30+. Recovery time elevated.",
               style = "color:#e8575a; background-color:#2a1a1a; padding:10px; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:12px;")
      else NULL

      surface_flag <- if (input$pred_surface == "Artificial Turf")
        tags$p(icon("exclamation-circle"), tags$b(" SURFACE RISK: "), info$surface_note,
               style = "color:#3db2ff; background-color:#1a1a2e; padding:10px; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:12px;")
      else NULL

      tagList(
        tags$div(style = "padding:10px;",
          tags$h4(paste0(pos, " - ", info$top_risk, " Most At Risk"),
                  style = "color:#c9243f; font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:15px; font-size:18px;"),
          tags$p(icon("notes-medical"), tags$b(" Primary Injury Mechanism"),
                 style = "color:white; font-size:14px; margin-bottom:5px;"),
          tags$p(info$mechanism,
                 style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:13px; margin-bottom:15px; line-height:1.5;"),
          workload_flag,
          age_flag,
          surface_flag,
          tags$p(icon("user-clock"), tags$b(" Age Insight: "), info$age_note,
                 style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:12px; margin-top:10px;"),
          tags$hr(style = "border-color:#2a3a5a;"),
          tags$p(icon("lightbulb"), tags$b(" Quick Stats: "),
                 paste0("Predicted risk: ", pct, "% | Model: ", input$pred_model,
                        " | Plays: ", input$pred_plays, " | Age: ", input$pred_age,
                        " | Surface: ", input$pred_surface),
                 style = "color:#6c8ebf; font-size:11px;")
        )
      )
    })
  }) # end observeEvent predict_btn

  # ── POSITION TAB ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$position_rate_plot <- renderPlot({
    req(input$position_choice)
    base_data() %>%
      filter(position_group %in% input$position_choice) %>%
      group_by(position_group) %>%
      summarise(injury_rate = mean(injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = reorder(position_group, injury_rate), y = injury_rate, fill = position_group)) +
      geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
      labs(x = "Position Group", y = "Injury Rate") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        text             = element_text(color = "white"),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA)
      )
  })

  # ── OVERVIEW TAB ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$total_injuries_box <- renderInfoBox({
    val <- sum(base_data()$injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)
    infoBox("Total Injuries", val, icon = icon("user-injured"), color = "red")
  })

  output$avg_per_season_box <- renderInfoBox({
    val <- base_data() %>%
      group_by(season) %>%
      summarise(inj = sum(injured_next_week)) %>%
      summarise(mean(inj)) %>%
      pull()
    infoBox("Avg Injuries / Season", round(val, 1), icon = icon("calendar"), color = "yellow")
  })

  output$injury_rate_box <- renderInfoBox({
    val <- mean(base_data()$injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)
    infoBox("Injury Rate", paste0(round(val * 100, 1), "%"), icon = icon("percent"), color = "aqua")
  })

  output$injury_cost_box <- renderInfoBox({
    infoBox("Estimated Injury Cost", "$500 - 800M+ / year",
            subtitle = "League-wide estimate", icon = icon("dollar-sign"), color = "green")
  })

  output$injury_season_trend <- renderPlot({
    base_data() %>%
      group_by(week) %>%
      summarise(injuries = sum(injured_next_week)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(week, injuries)) +
      geom_line(color = "#c9243f", size = 1.2) +
      theme_minimal()
  })

  output$overview_position_plot <- renderPlot({
    base_data() %>%
      group_by(position_group) %>%
      summarise(rate = mean(injured_next_week)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(reorder(position_group, rate), rate, fill = position_group)) +
      geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
      coord_flip() +
      theme_minimal()
  })

  output$overview_workload_plot <- renderPlot({
    base_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(total_plays, injured_next_week)) +
      geom_smooth(method = "glm", method.args = list(family = "binomial"), color = "#c9243f") +
      theme_minimal()
  })

  # ── RULES TAB ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  rule_timeline <- tibble::tribble(
  ~year, ~label, ~description, ~category,
  2011, "Kickoff moved to the 35", "Kickoffs were pushed back to encourage more touchbacks and reduce high-speed collisions.", "Safety",
  2011, "Blindside blocks banned", "Players could no longer deliver dangerous blindside blocks away from the point of attack.", "Safety",
  2013, "Defenseless player protections expanded", "Receiver protections were broadened to reduce heavy contact while making catches.", "Safety",
  2015, "Extra point moved back", "The extra point became a longer kick, turning it into a more meaningful play.", "Scoring",
  2015, "Peel-back blocks banned", "Blocks directed back toward the goal line were restricted to limit low-side contact.", "Safety",
  2017, "Leaping over the line banned", "Players could no longer vault the line on kick attempts, removing a high-risk technique.", "Safety",
  2018, "Catch rule simplified", "Catch completion requirements were clarified by removing the 'surviving the ground' language.", "Format",
  2018, "Lowering-the-head rule introduced", "Players were restricted from lowering the helmet to initiate contact.", "Safety",
  2019, "Pass interference became reviewable", "Coaches could challenge PI calls after a controversial missed call in the playoffs.", "Format",
  2020, "Pass interference review removed", "The replay system was quickly scrapped after one season because it rarely changed outcomes.", "Scrapped",
  2022, "Playoff overtime reform", "Both teams were guaranteed a possession in playoff overtime.", "Format",
  2024, "Dynamic kickoff adopted", "The kickoff was redesigned to reduce violent collisions while keeping the play in the game.", "Safety",
  2024, "Hip-drop tackle banned", "The league banned the hip-drop tackle technique to reduce lower-body injuries.", "Safety",
  2024, "Replay assistant expanded", "Replay support was broadened to improve review speed and consistency.", "Format"
)

rule_markers <- tibble::tribble(
  ~year, ~label,
  2011, "2011\nKickoff",
  2013, "2013\nDefenseless",
  2015, "2015\nExtra Point",
  2017, "2017\nLeaping",
  2018, "2018\nCatch Rule",
  2019, "2019\nPI Review",
  2022, "2022\nPlayoff OT",
  2024, "2024\nKickoff / Hip Drop"
)

rule_rate_data <- reactive({
  base_data() %>%
    group_by(season) %>%
    summarise(
      injury_rate = mean(injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_hits    = mean(times_hit, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_plays   = mean(total_plays, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
})

output$rules_timeline_plot <- renderPlot({
  df <- rule_rate_data()
  y_top <- max(df$injury_rate, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.15

  ggplot(df, aes(x = season, y = injury_rate)) +
    annotate(
      "rect",
      xmin = c(2011, 2013, 2015, 2018, 2022, 2024),
      xmax = c(2012, 2014, 2016, 2019, 2023, 2024.5),
      ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
      fill = c("#3db2ff", "#4ecca3", "#f0c040", "#b07cd8", "#6c8ebf", "#e8575a"),
      alpha = 0.06
    ) +
    geom_line(color = "#c9243f", linewidth = 1.4) +
    geom_point(color = "white", size = 2.8) +
    geom_vline(
      data = rule_markers,
      aes(xintercept = year),
      linetype = "dashed",
      color = "#3db2ff",
      linewidth = 0.7,
      alpha = 0.85
    ) +
    geom_label(
      data = rule_markers,
      aes(x = year, y = y_top, label = label),
      fill = "#3db2ff",
      color = "#16213e",
      label.size = 0,
      fontface = "bold",
      size = 3.1,
      vjust = 1
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.28))
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 10)) +
    labs(x = "Season", y = "Injury Rate") +
    theme_nfl_custom()
})

output$rules_hits_plot <- renderPlot({
  df <- rule_rate_data()

  ggplot(df, aes(x = avg_hits, y = injury_rate)) +
    geom_point(color = "#c9243f", size = 3) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#4ecca3", fill = "#4ecca3", alpha = 0.2) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
    labs(x = "Average Hits per Game", y = "Injury Rate") +
    theme_nfl_custom()
})

output$rules_workload_plot <- renderPlot({
  df <- rule_rate_data()

  ggplot(df, aes(x = avg_plays, y = injury_rate)) +
    geom_point(color = "#3db2ff", size = 3) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#c9243f", fill = "#c9243f", alpha = 0.2) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
    labs(x = "Average Total Plays", y = "Injury Rate") +
    theme_nfl_custom()
})

output$rules_cards <- renderUI({
  category_colors <- c(
    "Safety"  = "#4ecca3",
    "Format"  = "#3db2ff",
    "Scoring" = "#f0c040",
    "Scrapped" = "#e8575a"
  )

  cards <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(rule_timeline)), function(i) {
    r <- rule_timeline[i, ]
    cat_color <- category_colors[[as.character(r$category)]]
    if (is.null(cat_color)) cat_color <- "#b07cd8"

    tags$div(
      style = "display: flex; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 18px;",
      tags$div(
        style = paste0(
          "min-width: 58px; min-height: 40px; border-radius: 10px;",
          "background-color: #c9243f; color: white; font-weight: bold;",
          "display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;",
          "margin-right: 14px; flex-shrink: 0; padding: 0 10px;",
          "font-size: 14px;"
        ),
        r$year
      ),
      tags$div(
        style = paste0(
          "flex: 1; background-color: #0d0d1a; border-left: 4px solid ", cat_color, ";",
          "padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 6px;"
        ),
        tags$div(
          style = "margin-bottom: 6px;",
          tags$span(
            style = paste0(
              "display: inline-block; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 12px;",
              "font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; color: #16213e; background-color: ", cat_color, ";"
            ),
            r$category
          )
        ),
        tags$div(
          style = "color: #ffffff; font-weight: bold; font-size: 15px; margin-bottom: 4px;",
          r$label
        ),
        tags$div(
          style = "color: #b8c7ce; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5;",
          r$description
        )
      )
    )
  })

  tags$div(
    style = "padding: 10px 6px;",
    tags$div(
      style = "margin-bottom: 12px; color: #e0e0e0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold;",
      "Chronological Rule Timeline"
    ),
    tags$div(
      style = "border-left: 3px solid #3db2ff; padding-left: 10px; margin-left: 18px;",
      cards
    )
  )
})

# ── CONCUSSION TAB ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
nfl_concussion_data <- tibble::tribble(
  ~season, ~total,
  2015, 275,
  2016, 243,
  2017, 281,
  2018, 214,
  2019, 224,
  2020, 172,
  2021, 187,
  2022, 213,
  2023, 219,
  2024, 182
)

conc_takeaway_points <- c(
  "Concussions are still a major problem in football, even when equipment improves.",
  "Protection depends on more than gear: rules, technique, and recovery all matter.",
  "Repeated head impacts are part of the long-term concern around CTE.",
  "Return-to-play decisions should be medically supervised and consistent."
)

output$conc_total_box <- renderInfoBox({
  infoBox(
    "2024 Concussions",
    182,
    subtitle = "public NFL season total",
    icon = icon("brain"),
    color = "red",
    fill = TRUE
  )
})

output$conc_drop_box <- renderInfoBox({
  infoBox(
    "2024 vs 2023",
    "17% down",
    subtitle = "reported concussion change",
    icon = icon("arrow-down"),
    color = "green",
    fill = TRUE
  )
})

output$conc_rtp_box <- renderInfoBox({
  infoBox(
    "Typical RTP",
    "9 days",
    subtitle = "post-concussion return-to-play",
    icon = icon("clock"),
    color = "yellow",
    fill = TRUE
  )
})

output$conc_focus_box <- renderInfoBox({
  infoBox(
    "Safety Focus",
    "Prevention",
    subtitle = "not gear alone",
    icon = icon("shield-alt"),
    color = "aqua",
    fill = TRUE
  )
})

output$conc_trend_plot <- renderPlot({
  ggplot(nfl_concussion_data, aes(x = season, y = total)) +
    geom_line(color = "#c9243f", linewidth = 1.4) +
    geom_point(color = "white", size = 3) +
    geom_text(aes(label = total), vjust = -1.1, color = "white", size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(2018, 2019, 2024), linetype = "dashed", color = "#3db2ff", linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_label(
      data = data.frame(
        season = c(2018, 2019, 2024),
        label = c("Helmet / Kickoff", "Blindside / PI", "2024 Low Point")
      ),
      aes(x = season, y = max(nfl_concussion_data$total) * 1.12, label = label),
      fill = "#3db2ff", color = "#16213e", label.size = 0, fontface = "bold", size = 3.1
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = nfl_concussion_data$season) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.20))) +
    labs(x = "Season", y = "Reported Concussions") +
    theme_nfl_custom()
})

output$conc_takeaways <- renderUI({
  tagList(
    lapply(conc_takeaway_points, function(x) {
      tags$p(
        tags$b("• "),
        x,
        style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:13px; margin-bottom:10px; line-height:1.5;"
      )
    })
  )
})

output$conc_recovery_info <- renderUI({
  tagList(
    tags$div(style = "padding: 4px 8px;",
      tags$h4(icon("notes-medical"), "  Why recovery and prevention matter",
              style = "color:#c9243f; font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:10px;"),
      tags$p("A concussion can affect attention, reaction time, balance, and long-term neurological health. That is why return-to-play decisions should be conservative and medically supervised.",
             style = "color:#e0e0e0; font-size:13px; line-height:1.6;"),
      tags$p("The Harvard Public Health article emphasizes that safety gear alone is not enough to prevent brain injury in tackle football. Prevention also depends on rule changes, technique, and consistent oversight.",
             style = "color:#e0e0e0; font-size:13px; line-height:1.6;"),
      tags$hr(style = "border-color:#2a3a5a;"),
      tags$h4(icon("exclamation-triangle"), "  Key prevention themes",
              style = "color:#f0c040; font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:8px;"),
      tags$ul(
        tags$li("Reduce helmet-first contact"),
        tags$li("Limit high-speed kickoff collisions"),
        tags$li("Use consistent return-to-play protocols"),
        tags$li("Treat equipment as one part of a larger safety strategy")
      ),
      tags$hr(style = "border-color:#2a3a5a;"),
      tags$p(
        "Sources: NFL Player Health & Safety (Injury Data Since 2015); NFL Operations (2025) — Concussions Decrease to Historic Low in 2024 NFL Season; Harvard Public Health / Katherine O’Malley (2025) — There’s a way to deal with brain injuries in football. It isn’t safety gear.",
        style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:10px; margin-top:10px;"
      )
    )
  )
})

} # end server


# ─── RUN APP ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
shinyApp(ui, server)
```
